hero.title: Hello, I'm Xavier Nouaille, a full-stack developer based in Paris
hero.paragraph:
Engineer and full-stack developer trained at Epitech Paris, I offer my skills to design robust, high-performance, and high-quality web applications.
With over 5 years of experience in full-stack development, I have collaborated with teams of 5 to 10 developers on significant projects.

about.paragraph:
My journey started with personal projects, quickly evolving into professional collaborations. Among these, my contribution at Offeaze, a SaaS platform, was significant. I worked on both the frontend and backend development of the platform, facilitating the connection between coworking spaces and companies/individuals.
Although the project came to an end, it strengthened my technical skills and understanding of user needs.

Currently, I am part of the team at DialOnce, a SaaS software editor specializing in customer relationship digitalization. My role involves orchestrating contact journeys in a dynamic environment focused on efficiency and innovation.

As a freelance developer, I offer my services for the creation of robust, resilient, and high-quality platforms. My expertise extends to building digital experiences.
about.modalText: As an experienced freelancer, I offer my services for the complete design of your web platforms, whether on the frontend or backend, implementing robust solutions in TypeScript. I am open to any discussion to understand your specific needs and find the best approach for your project.
